challenge.successMessage: You bypassed authentication using SQL Injection!

whyVulnerable.title: Why the Vulnerable Version Was Exploited
whyVulnerable.explanation: The application directly inserted user input into an SQL query. This allowed attackers to modify the query logic.
whyVulnerable.code: const query = `SELECT * FROM users WHERE username='${username}' AND password='${password}'`;
whyVulnerable.answer: User input becomes part of SQL syntax instead of data.

secureFix.title: How Secure Code Prevents SQL Injection
secureFix.explanation: Prepared statements treat input as data instead of executable SQL.
secureFix.code: db.all('SELECT * FROM users WHERE username=? AND password=?', [username, password]);
